title: Weird behavior in my account

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

My monday account started to behave weird, and on the day of the contest submission…

The board, not only my board view, is not loading some times (in another account of mine everything works) and things on the monday side are not displayed properly. See here.

Others experience it too?

Help by the monday team would be highly appreciated.

Best,
Ronen

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rbabayoff,

Looks like this was an issue on our end (not specific to just your account). I checked in with the team and it looks like we deployed a fix for this already - would you mind refreshing your browser (or logging out/in)? Let me know if that clears it up!

-Daniel

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
